System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_L21B_SOW-R_UDS_20170324.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7D4
Receive ID 7D5
Functional Addr 64
Functional Name SOW_right
